name: Armament Reincarnation
effectText:
Special Summon "Armament Reincarnation Tokens" (Warrior/LIGHT/Level 1/ATK 500/DEF 500) up to the number of cards in your GY, that are Equip Spells OR Traps with effects that equip themselves as Equip Cards, then you can apply the following effect, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn.
●Destroy as many cards in your Spell & Trap Zone as possible, including this card, then Set as many cards as possible from your GY, that are Equip Spells OR Traps with effects that equip themselves as Equip Cards. These Set Traps can be activated this turn.
